---
id: sync-spotify
title: "Sync Spotify data"
description: "Triggers an incremental sync of Spotify playlists and listening history. Returns an HTML fragment."

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/preferences/spotify/sync"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Triggers an incremental sync of Spotify playlists and listening history. Returns an HTML fragment.

  parameters={undefined}
